title: Unifying 12 Decentralized Departments
summary: How iERP bridged the gap between legacy silos and a unified administrative cloud.
full_story: Stanford Global Institute faced a critical challenge: 12 different departments were using 12 different legacy systems. Data was fragmented, and institutional reporting took weeks. By implementing iERP's unified infrastructure, they achieved a single source of truth within 6 months. The transition allowed for real-time resource allocation and a massive reduction in manual reconciliation tasks.

title: Predictive Retention at Scale
summary: Leveraging AI heuristics to identify at-risk students before they fall behind.
full_story: MIT Tech Academy utilized iERP's AI-driven retention engine to analyze behavioral patterns and academic performance. The system successfully identified students struggling with coursework weeks before midterm exams, allowing faculty to intervene proactively. This human-centric application of AI has transformed their academic support culture.

title: Zero-Trust Security for Global Research
summary: Protecting sensitive intellectual property across a global network of researchers.
full_story: Oxford Research Hub required a secure yet accessible environment for their global network of 5,000+ researchers. iERP's Zero-Trust architecture provided the perfect balance, ensuring that high-value intellectual property was protected while grant management and data sharing remained friction-free. The system has become the gold standard for secure academic collaboration.

title: Autonomous Ledger Orchestration
summary: Transforming complex multi-currency budgeting with real-time AI audits.
full_story: The Zurich Finance School managed a complex ecosystem of international grants and multi-currency operations. iERP's financial suite automated the entire ledger synchronization process, eliminating human error in reconciliation. Their fiscal year-end closing process, which previously took 30 days, is now completed in less than 48 hours.
